infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Arc needs camera access to scan and analyze food.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Arc needs microphone access for voice logging.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Arc needs photo library access to analyze food photos.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Arc uses speech recognition for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Arc uses Face ID to protect locked modules.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Arc reads your health data to sync steps, sleep, and heart metrics.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Arc writes health entries you log in the app.

plugins.cameraPermission: Arc needs camera access to scan food.

plugins.photosPermission: Arc needs photo access to analyze food photos.
